en_title: Valve Reportedly Threatened to Delist Rainbow Six Siege on Steam After Ubisoft Offered Cheaper Alternative
cn_title: Valve威胁下架《彩虹六号：围攻》？因育碧UPlay低价包引发争端
subtitle: Steam霸权不容挑战
opus_summary: 据彭博社报道，Valve为维护Steam在PC市场的统治地位，曾采取激进手段，包括威胁育碧将《彩虹六号：围攻》从Steam下架，原因是育碧在自家UPlay商店推出了更便宜的15美元(约合人民币107元)新手包。此外，华纳兄弟互动也因《中土世界：战争之影》的定价问题遭到Valve干预。相关邮件在针对Valve的反垄断诉讼中被曝光，揭示了其要求平台定价一致性的强硬立场。Valve在2026年还面临9亿美元(约合人民币64亿元)的垄断诉讼，纽约州总检察长也已介入调查。

paragraphs.en: Valve has allegedly gone to great lengths to maintain Steam's position as a marketplace titan on PC, including one example that reportedly saw it threaten to retaliate against Ubisoft by delisting Rainbow Six Siege .
paragraphs.cn: 据称，Valve为维护Steam在PC市场的霸主地位不遗余力，其中一个例子便是它曾威胁要将育碧的《彩虹六号：围攻》从Steam下架作为报复。

paragraphs.en: Information related to the goings-on at the gaming tech company comes from an extensive Bloomberg report (paywall). The site stated that, as indicated by emails uncovered as part of an antitrust lawsuit against the Half-Life developer, there has been more than one occasion where Valve used aggressive tactics against publishers looking to bolster their own digital storefronts.
paragraphs.cn: 这家游戏科技公司的内幕信息来自彭博社的一篇长篇报道（付费墙）。该报道称，针对Valve的反垄断诉讼中曝光的邮件显示，Valve曾多次对试图壮大自家数字商店的发行商采取激进手段。

paragraphs.en: Perhaps the most significant example presented in the report involves Assassin's Creed publisher Ubisoft and its tactical first-person shooter, Rainbow Six Siege. Undated emails related to the incident paint a picture that reportedly saw Valve employees threaten to delist the popular video game from Steam in response to a cheaper $15 starter pack option offered by Ubisoft on its UPlay store. Valve allegedly told the publisher it would remove Rainbow Six Siege from Steam "by end of day tomorrow" if the situation was not rectified.
paragraphs.cn: 报道中最引人注目的例子涉及《刺客信条》发行商育碧及其战术第一人称射击游戏《彩虹六号：围攻》。与此事件相关的未注明日期的邮件显示，Valve员工曾威胁要将这款热门游戏从Steam下架，原因是育碧在其UPlay商店提供了更便宜的15美元(约合人民币107元)新手包。据称，Valve告知育碧，如果情况不得到纠正，将在「明天结束前」将《彩虹六号：围攻》从Steam移除。

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg reported that Warner Bros. Interactive once found itself entangled with Valve, too. Steam business team member Kassidy Gerber allegedly wrote to the game publishing arm regarding Middle-earth: Shadow of War in 2017.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社报道称，华纳兄弟互动也曾与Valve产生纠葛。2017年，Steam业务团队成员Kassidy Gerber曾就《中土世界：战争之影》一事致函该游戏发行部门。

paragraphs.en: The interaction saw her telling executives at the company that pre-orders for the project had been deleted from Steam because the price was "significantly higher than what was available at other retailers for the same version of the game." Warner Bros. Interactive's , David Haddad, allegedly hopped on the phone only a few hours later to work on a fix.
paragraphs.cn: 她在沟通中告知公司高管，该项目的预购订单已从Steam删除，因为其价格「明显高于其他零售商提供的同一版本游戏」。据称，华纳兄弟互动的David Haddad在几小时后便打电话寻求解决方案。

paragraphs.en: Additional details from the lawsuit allege Gerber denied that Steam has a policy regarding pricing parity. "I don’t really know what you mean by 'policy,'" she said during the lawsuit. "In general, I don’t feel like we have a lot of policies. That sounds kind of bureaucratic to me." When plaintiffs presented Gerber with one of her own statements saying otherwise, she replied that she didn't remember saying that.
paragraphs.cn: 诉讼中的更多细节指控Gerber否认Steam有关于定价一致性的政策。她在诉讼中表示：「我真的不明白你说的『政策』是什么意思。总的来说，我不觉得我们有很多政策。这听起来有点官僚。」当原告向Gerber出示她自己的相反陈述时，她回答说不记得说过那些话。

paragraphs.en: Valve has found itself in the hot seat for more reasons than one in 2026. In January, the company was faced with a $900 million lawsuit over monopoly claims . New York Attorney General Letitia James in February. Valve responded to that lawsuit in March and again in May .
paragraphs.cn: 2026年，Valve因多重原因陷入困境。1月，该公司因垄断指控面临9亿美元(约合人民币64亿元)的诉讼。纽约州总检察长Letitia James于2月介入。Valve在3月和5月分别对该诉讼作出了回应。
